hero.title: Building AI Products, Digital Experiences & Scalable Web Applications
hero.subtitle: I design and build modern software products with a focus on usability, performance, and long-term value. Based in Istanbul, Türkiye.

about.title: Integrating design thinking with robust architectural software engineering.
about.p1: My approach is rooted in the belief that software should be as intentional as physical architecture. Every line of code, like every structural beam, must serve a purpose and support the overall vision.
about.p2: I specialize in turning ideas into functional digital products, focusing on software architecture, web development, and creating effective user experiences. In each project, the priority is to build solutions that are both technically sound and best meet the real needs of users.
about.p3: Design and develop web products equipped with artificial intelligence capabilities that provide a smarter, faster, and more efficient experience for users.

Lumora.title: Lumora — Multilingual Art Marketplace

milowra.desc: Designed and developed a modern multi-language website for Milowra, a creative event brand focused on artistic and cultural experiences. Integrated a powerful admin panel, giving the owner full control over website content, event management, and day-to-day operations.

forex.title: Forex Pattern Automation
forex.desc: Transforming forex trading strategies into fully automated trading bots, helping traders eliminate emotional decision-making and execute trades with consistency.

server.title: Scalable Backend Systems & Intelligent Applications
server.desc: Building intelligent interaction systems that connect natural language interfaces with backend workflows such as scheduling, calendar synchronization, and automated task management.

milowra.title: Milowra
milowra.summary: A beautifully responsive, tri-lingual platform for an event company, featuring a React frontend, Django backend, and automated translation workflows.
milowra.role: Lead Full-Stack Engineer — frontend architecture, backend API, database modeling, and UI/UX implementation.
milowra.problem: The event company needed a way to reach a diverse, multilingual audience without multiplying their administrative workload. Manual translation and fragmented communication channels were slowing down event updates and customer inquiries.
milowra.overview: Milowra is a tri-lingual event discovery platform built to connect attendees with experiences seamlessly. Pairing a beautiful, responsive React frontend with a robust Django backend, it features automated content translation, direct WhatsApp integrations for fast communication, and a highly customized admin dashboard for effortless data manipulation.

features.title: Tri-Lingual Automation
features.desc: Built-in support for three languages with an automated translation pipeline for all user-added event items.

features.title: WhatsApp Integration
features.desc: Direct communication links that connect users straight to event organizers via WhatsApp for seamless inquiries.

features.title: Tailored Admin Dashboard
features.desc: A customized Django admin interface designed for easy data manipulation and effortless event management.

features.title: Responsive UI/UX
features.desc: A beautifully crafted frontend that ensures a flawless browsing experience across all devices and screen sizes.

highlights.title: React & Django Architecture
highlights.desc: A decoupled architecture using React for a dynamic frontend and Django REST Framework for robust API delivery.

highlights.title: PostgreSQL Database Design
highlights.desc: A well-structured relational schema designed for efficient querying of multilingual event data.

highlights.title: Automated Content Pipeline
highlights.desc: Items added via the admin panel are automatically translated, keeping all three language versions in perfect sync.

challenges.title: Handling dynamic multi-language text safely
challenges.solution: Implemented strict character limits and responsive design fallbacks in React to ensure the UI doesn't break when translated into longer or shorter languages.

challenges.title: Streamlining the admin workflow
challenges.solution: Customized the Django admin classes to hide unnecessary complexity, giving the event managers a clean, intuitive data entry interface.

milowra.outcome: A high-performing, visually stunning platform that allows the event company to effortlessly manage their offerings and instantly reach international clients in their preferred language.
milowra.lessons: Automating the translation pipeline at the database entry level saves countless hours of administrative work and eliminates the risk of missing translations on the frontend.

ArtGallery.title: ArtGallery
ArtGallery.tagline: Multilingual Marketplace Platform for Artists and Collectors
ArtGallery.summary: A full-stack Django marketplace where artists publish original work, collectors discover and negotiate, and a multilingual content pipeline reaches a global audience.
ArtGallery.role: Lead Full-Stack Engineer — architecture, backend, database, frontend integration, and i18n pipeline.
ArtGallery.problem: Independent artists rarely have the channels — or the languages — to reach international collectors. ArtGallery is built to remove that friction with a single platform that handles listings, negotiation, identity, and translation as one cohesive workflow.
ArtGallery.overview: ArtGallery is a full-stack marketplace that connects artists and buyers across three languages. It pairs a Django-powered marketplace with a multi-role identity system, an offer & messaging engine, and an automated translation workflow that prepares every artwork for a global audience.

features.title: Multi-Role User System
features.desc: Artist and buyer accounts share one identity layer but receive distinct dashboards, capabilities, and role-based permissions.

features.title: Seller Dashboard
features.desc: Artwork management, listing controls, profile presentation, and a live view of marketplace activity for the artist.

features.title: Buyer Experience
features.desc: Saved artworks, personal profile, offer tracking, and a unified history of every interaction with the catalogue.

features.title: Messaging & Communication
features.desc: Internal messaging, structured offer workflow, and a buyer-seller inbox built around real negotiation, not noise.

features.title: Marketplace Infrastructure
features.desc: Artwork listings, discovery surfaces, artist profiles, and offer management woven into a single navigable catalogue.

features.title: Internationalization
features.desc: Three-language support with dynamic language switching, designed from day one for a global collector audience.

features.title: Automated Translation Workflow
features.desc: Artwork content is automatically prepared for multiple languages, with translation automation wired directly into the content pipeline.

features.title: User Verification
features.desc: Phone verification, address management, and a hardened account-creation flow to keep the marketplace trustworthy.

highlights.title: Django Architecture
highlights.desc: Modular app structure separating identity, marketplace, messaging, and i18n concerns.

highlights.title: PostgreSQL Database Design
highlights.desc: Normalised schema for artworks, offers, conversations, and verified profiles.

highlights.title: Multi-Role Authentication
highlights.desc: Single auth surface, two role tracks (artist / buyer) with isolated permission sets.

highlights.title: Marketplace Workflows
highlights.desc: Listing → discovery → offer → negotiation → resolution, modelled end-to-end.

highlights.title: Internationalization Architecture
highlights.desc: Locale routing, content fallbacks, and language-aware templates across the platform.

highlights.title: Automated Translation Workflow
highlights.desc: Translation automation integrated into content management so new listings ship multilingual by default.

highlights.title: Permission Management
highlights.desc: Role-aware decorators and querysets ensure each user sees only what they should.

highlights.title: Dashboard Architecture
highlights.desc: Two distinct dashboards (seller / buyer) built on a shared design language and component system.

challenges.title: Modelling two user types without forking the platform
challenges.solution: A shared profile core with role extensions, plus permission-aware querysets that keep artist and buyer surfaces cleanly separated.

challenges.title: Keeping three languages in sync as content evolves
challenges.solution: An automated translation pipeline tied to the artwork lifecycle, so new content is translated and indexed without manual intervention.

challenges.title: Turning negotiation into a structured product
challenges.solution: An offer + messaging engine that records every step of buyer-seller communication as first-class data, not as a chat afterthought.

ArtGallery.outcome: ArtGallery ships as a coherent marketplace platform rather than a gallery: artists onboard, list, negotiate, and sell, while collectors browse and engage in their own language. The result is a production-grade Django product demonstrating advanced full-stack capability.
ArtGallery.lessons: Designing for two user types from day one forces clarity in every layer — schema, permissions, dashboards, and UI. Treating translation as infrastructure (not a feature) keeps the product genuinely global as it grows.

forex.title: Forex Pattern Finder
forex.tagline: Algorithmic Market Analysis for Harmonic Patterns
forex.summary: A Python tool that scans market data to detect harmonic patterns and price action setups, surfacing trade ideas with quantitative rigour.
forex.role: Engineer — algorithm design, data pipeline, and analytics interface.
forex.problem: Manual pattern recognition on forex charts is slow, subjective, and easy to bias. Traders need an objective scanner that surfaces structurally valid setups across many instruments at once.
forex.overview: The Forex Pattern Finder ingests historical and live market data, runs harmonic and price-action detectors over it, and presents a ranked list of setups with the geometry, ratios, and context behind each signal.

features.title: Pattern Detection
features.desc: Harmonic and classic price action patterns identified across multiple timeframes.

features.title: Quantitative Scoring
features.desc: Each candidate setup ranked by ratio quality, structure, and context.

features.title: Multi-Timeframe Scan
features.desc: Concurrent analysis across timeframes with consistent geometry rules.

features.title: Analyst Dashboard
features.desc: Django interface to filter, inspect, and export detected setups.

highlights.title: Vectorised Detection
highlights.desc: Pandas + NumPy pipelines for high-throughput pattern scans.

highlights.title: Deterministic Geometry
highlights.desc: Strict ratio tolerances ensure reproducible, auditable signals.

highlights.title: Django Frontend
highlights.desc: Lightweight admin-style UI for inspecting and exporting results.

challenges.title: Detecting valid patterns without overfitting noise
challenges.solution: Strict ratio tolerances combined with structural pre-filters to drop unstable candidates before scoring.

challenges.title: Processing large historical datasets efficiently
challenges.solution: Vectorised Pandas operations and chunked scans to keep multi-symbol, multi-timeframe runs tractable.

forex.outcome: An analytical tool that reliably surfaces structurally valid setups across many instruments, replacing hours of manual chart work with a single ranked scan.
forex.lessons: Quantitative tools live or die by data hygiene. Investing early in clean pipelines paid off across every downstream feature.

server.title: Scalable Backend Infrastructure
server.summary: Research and implementation of resilient, distributed backend services for enterprise-level workloads, with a focus on Docker orchestration and distributed data.
server.role: Architect / Engineer — service design, orchestration, and database topology.
server.problem: Enterprise applications need backends that stay available under load, deploy safely, and scale horizontally without rewrites. Achieving that takes deliberate architecture, not glue code.
server.overview: A reference architecture and implementation track exploring microservice decomposition, container orchestration, and distributed database patterns suitable for production enterprise workloads.

features.title: Service Decomposition
features.desc: Domain-driven service boundaries with clear contracts.

features.title: Container Orchestration
features.desc: Reproducible Docker-based deployments and scaling.

features.title: Distributed Data
features.desc: Patterns for replication, caching, and eventual consistency.

features.title: Resilience
features.desc: Health checks, retries, and graceful degradation built in.

highlights.title: Docker Orchestration
highlights.desc: Composable, reproducible service deployments across environments.

highlights.title: Distributed Databases
highlights.desc: PostgreSQL topologies with Redis-backed caching layers.

highlights.title: Observability
highlights.desc: Structured logging and health surfaces to support production operations.

challenges.title: Keeping services independently deployable
challenges.solution: Strict contracts and versioned APIs between services.

challenges.title: Coordinating data across services without coupling them
challenges.solution: Event-driven sync patterns with idempotent consumers.

server.outcome: An ongoing reference implementation that demonstrates how to compose resilient, scalable backends from independently deployable services.
server.lessons: Reliability is an architectural property, not a layer you bolt on. The earlier it's designed in, the cheaper it stays.
